data.content: Implementation complete on branch worktree-knots-e935-list-lease-agent (commit 1ccba24b). list_knots now mirrors show_knot's enrich_bound_lease_agent so kno ls --json populates lease_agent for active action knots. Queued knots without a bound lease still emit no lease_agent. Regression test in src/app/tests_list_lease.rs covers both shapes. make sanity passes (1122 tests, 95.10% coverage).
